category_sources: source_facts.description says HackRF is a low cost software radio platform; official repository says it contains hardware designs and software for HackRF, an open source Software Defined Radio platform.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is hackrf; official repository and documentation use HackRF.
docs_sources: Official greatscottgadgets/hackrf README points to HackRF Read the Docs; official README also documents the project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official repository topics include radio, hardware, sdr, hackrf, and rf; official docs cover HackRF hardware, firmware, and software tools.
